ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the show */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Original air date of the show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Genre of the show */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Production company ID */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Production company name */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime in minutes */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes */,
  "total_seasons" INTEGER /* Total number of seasons */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Premiere date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being tracked */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the recorded viewership */,
  "viewers_millions" REAL /* Number of viewers in millions */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Viewership data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Viewership data type */,
  "demographic_data" TEXT /* Viewership demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searchers" (
  "searcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each searcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the searcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the searcher */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the searcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the searcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("searcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_searchers" (
  "show_searcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for this association */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "searcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the searcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the searcher on the show */,
  "credit_order" INTEGER /* Credit order of the searcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_searcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_searchers_searcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("searcher_id") REFERENCES searchers ("searcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_searchers_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "sub_genre" TEXT /* Sub-genre of the genre */,
  "parent_genre" TEXT /* Parent genre of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show to which this episode belongs */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "writers" TEXT /* Writers of the episode */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime in minutes */,
  "airdate" TEXT /* Airdate of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being analyzed */,
  "viewership_trend" TEXT /* Trend description based on viewership data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Analytics data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Analytics data type */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Analytics data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing strategy */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show associated with this strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing strategy */,
  "impact_on_viewers" REAL /* Estimated impact on viewership in millions */,
  "budget" REAL /* Marketing strategy budget */,
  "ROI" REAL /* Marketing strategy ROI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_strategies_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the show data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the show data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "production_company_description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)
